name: Penghu County (Taiwan)
description: A yellow field charged at the centre with the Penghu County emblem.
history: Penghu County (Penghu Xian, also called the Pescadores) consists of an archipelago of about ninety islands in the Taiwan Strait. The current county flag, with its emblem of waves and the stylised name 澎湖 ('billowing lake'), evokes the maritime setting of the islands.

features.symbolism: stylised waves and the characters 澎湖 ('billowing lake'), expressing the maritime character of the archipelago in the Taiwan Strait
